channel.title: Posts on solderneer.eth
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on solderneer.eth

item.title: Top, Bottom, Up, Down
item.description: Visionaries and dreamers have defined innovation culture in the startup ecosystem of the last 3 decades. In fact, we find ourselves in a world where cult founder personalities are aplenty, look no further than Elon Musk, Bill Gates and Steve Jobs. This makes sense. Elon Musk’s vision for affordable electric cars, and his drive to bring that vision to reality is what gave us Tesla. The company’s mission was always driven top-down by what Elon Musk wanted for the future.

item.title: Gm everyone 🌈
item.description: Welcome to my new blog- this is going to be a collection of my random thoughts on web3, life, building cool things and anything in between. Sit back, relax and enjoy the show :)
